_description: Demo-mode overrides for the VAT Fraud Detection agent. Each entry short-circuits the real agent subprocess for transactions matching the 'match' criteria, returning a pre-canned result after the configured 'delay_seconds'. This avoids the ~1 min LLM+RAG round-trip on cases we want to showcase deterministically. Edit this file in place, then POST /api/simulation/reset (or click Reset on the Simulation page) to apply. Changes are picked up on the next agent invocation — no server restart needed.

_fields.name: human-readable identifier for this override (log line uses it)
_fields.enabled: boolean — set to false to keep the entry in the file but skip it. Default is true if the field is missing.
_fields.match.seller_name: exact Seller_Name match (case-sensitive); omit or leave empty to match any seller
_fields.match.item_description_contains: substring match (case-insensitive) against the tx item_description; omit or leave empty to match any description
_fields.delay_seconds: integer — how many real seconds to wait before returning the pre-canned result. Simulates the thinking time of the real agent. Set to 0 for an instant response.
_fields.recommendation: one of: correct | incorrect | uncertain. Anything else (typo, missing, etc.) defaults to 'incorrect' which drives the Customs Officer toward Recommend Control.
_fields.rationale: free text — shown as the agent's reasoning in the Tax Authority case view and the VAT Fraud Detection activity log.
_fields.source: free text — shown as a single legislation reference in the Tax VAT Assessment panel.

overrides.name: shenzhen_bone_conduction
overrides.rationale: Open-ear bone-conduction sport headsets declared under EL-08 ('Hearing aid / medical audio device', IE zero-rated) are not eligible for the 0% rate because the product carries no medical certification and is marketed as consumer sports equipment. The correct classification is EL-03 ('Consumer audio device') at the Irish standard rate of 23%.
overrides.source: Revenue Tax & Duty Manual — Part 05-03-02 (Medical devices and appliances — zero-rating criteria)
